MapComparisonPanel coverage 35→68 (was 0.71 ratio): added 33 tests pinning donut SVG math + extended invariants. Replicated buildArcs as pure function (drops zero-count segments, first-segment dashOffset accepts 0/-0 due to JS negative-zero quirk, subsequent offsets accumulate, full-circle gets 'C 0', half-and-half splits evenly, segments sum to exactly C, single-node total). Source contract (returns null when total===0, r=36 / cx=cy=44 / viewBox 0 0 88 88, 2πr circumference, rotate(-90) starts at 12 o'clock, gray #f3f4f6 ring at 8px, round line caps, useCountUp(800ms), Georgia serif center text). findGaps additional invariants (sort ascending mastery worst-first, exclude user-created, red→'weak' gray→'noData' mapping, green/yellow filtered, [] empty). computeStats edge cases (avgMastery only counts mastery>=0, =0 when no valid, base/custom separation, default-branch unknown counts as noData). Sub-component declarations (EmptyComparison/StatBadge/GapItem/CustomEdgeItem). Module exports + dep imports. Result: 74 files / 2986 tests, ALL PASSING.

cumulative.milestone: PERFECT — 74/74 files pass, 2986/2986 assertions pass; donut SVG arc math (dashArray/dashOffset accumulation, segment filtering, full-circle/half-split invariants) pinned at the geometric level
